callInsights.summary: Seller frustrated — not getting any buyer enquiries despite 2 months on platform.
callInsights.quote: I paid for MDC but haven't got a single order. What am I paying for?
callInsights.commitmentByExec: Will escalate catalog indexing to Product team

callInsights.summary: Platform sending retail buyers to a raw-material wholesaler. BL filters not working as configured.
callInsights.quote: I sell in tonnes to factories. Why am I getting calls from small shops?
callInsights.commitmentByExec: Raised BL filter ticket with product team

callInsights.summary: Follow-up on BL filter issue — not yet resolved. Seller growing impatient.
Seller evaluating IndiaTrade offer. Feels IndiaMART not delivering ROI at current price.
callInsights.quote: IndiaTrade is giving me a 3-month trial free. Why would I renew here?
callInsights.commitmentByExec: Will discuss package options and loyalty discount

callInsights.summary: Seller frustrated with poor lead quality and unanswered support tickets.
callInsights.quote: I'm paying IM Star money but most leads are retail buyers wasting my time.
callInsights.commitmentByExec: Will review BL filter config and prioritise support ticket

callInsights.summary: Discussed BL filter tuning. Seller agreed to try but skeptical.
Seller says enquiries dropped sharply. Blames algorithm changes for poor BL relevance.
callInsights.quote: Last 2 months I'm getting half the calls I used to get.
callInsights.commitmentByExec: Scheduled catalog audit for next week

callInsights.summary: Seller threatening to switch to TradeIndia. Multiple complaints unresolved.
callInsights.quote: TradeIndia is offering me same package at 30% less. Why should I stay?
callInsights.commitmentByExec: Escalated to Sales Manager. Pricing review in progress.

callInsights.summary: Seller upset about PNS missed calls — wants better call routing.
Seller wants help refreshing catalog images. Open to retention if platform helps.
Frustrated with LMS UI — team cannot keep up with replies. Losing leads daily.
callInsights.quote: My staff doesn't understand the new LMS. We're losing leads daily.
callInsights.commitmentByExec: Scheduled LMS training session for seller's team

callInsights.summary: Pricing complaint — renewal cost up 20% but orders haven't grown proportionally.
callInsights.quote: Renewal cost has gone up 20% but my orders haven't.
callInsights.commitmentByExec: Requested loyalty discount approval from management

callInsights.summary: Seller acknowledges seasonal slowdown in construction activity Mar–May. Expects recovery in June.
callInsights.commitmentByExec: Deferred renewal discussion to June when season picks up

callInsights.summary: Seller not seeing enough B2B food-factory buyers. ROI concerns but willing to continue if improved.
callInsights.commitmentByExec: Will recalibrate BL category filters to exclude retail food buyers

callInsights.summary: Getting retail pharmacy leads despite being a bulk API/ingredient supplier.
callInsights.quote: I need bulk pharma buyers, not medical shops. Fix the filter or I'm leaving.
callInsights.commitmentByExec: Raised P1 BL filter ticket for pharma category

callInsights.summary: Received IndiaB2B prospecting call. Comparing platform features and pricing.
callInsights.quote: IndiaB2B showed me a feature where buyers can schedule a call. Does IndiaMART have that?
callInsights.commitmentByExec: Highlighted PNS auto-connect as equivalent feature

callInsights.summary: Routine check-in. Seller concerned about slight dip but committed to renewal.
Happy with platform performance. Asking about premium add-ons and IM Leader package.
Seller satisfied. Mentioned strong order growth this quarter.
Seller very satisfied. Mentioned 3 large OEM orders via platform this quarter.
Strong renewal intent. Exploring upgrade to IM Leader package for higher BL allocation.
